theme_notes: US-Iran peace deal declared '24 hours away' as the Strait of Hormuz stays closed; Trump's actual 80th birthday today with a UFC event on the White House South Lawn; 2026 FIFA World Cup (48 teams) in full swing; F1 Spanish GP race day in Barcelona and the 24 Hours of Le Mans wrapping today.
settled: Iran peace deal: 24 hours away. Your balance: already there. One took fewer missiles.
Le Mans just finished. So did your debt. Both ran longer than expected.
You're balanced. Trump is 80. The bar for miracles is very low today.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup hot dog. You still owe it, though.
Half a lap around Barcelona costs more. Still faster than your Venmo.
Trump's 80th is today. This debt is less than his birthday cake budget. Both embarrassing.
The Strait of Hormuz is still closed. So has your banking app been for four days.
A World Cup group stage scarf costs less. You chose this instead.
Brunson drops 40 in crunch time. You drop the ball on Venmo.
Forty-eight countries showed up to the World Cup. You can't show up to a payment app.
That's grandstand seats at Le Mans. You picked debt over one of the greatest races on earth.
Trump is 80 and watching UFC at the White House. You're here owing $400.
The Iran peace deal is 24 hours away. Your payment: no scheduled ETA.
World Cup knockout stage starts soon. Yours already happened.
That's a World Cup semifinal ticket. You bought a relationship crisis instead.
This isn't a debt. It's an unauthorized FIFA sponsorship.
Le Mans ran 24 hours straight. You haven't run one Venmo transaction.
The Strait of Hormuz blocks shipping. Your excuses block accountability. Same results.
The Strait of Hormuz closed. Your financial credibility followed. Neither reopening soon.
You're not a partner anymore. You're a rogue state with a shared streaming account.
Trump threw a UFC party at the White House for his 80th. You owe this. Only one is fun.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a World Cup churro. The principle remains.
The Strait of Hormuz will reopen before this Venmo arrives.
They owe you $35. Trump is 80. The world is chaos. But $35 is still $35.

Iran is 24 hours from a peace deal. They're no closer to a payment.

Two Le Mans tickets. They owe you 24 hours of racing AND basic financial respect.

That's Trump's birthday party catering budget. They owe you the whole spread.

Iran and the US are closer to peace than you two are to settled.
F1 drivers did 66 laps in Barcelona today. They haven't made one payment.
The World Cup has 48 teams. Your patience has zero left.
That's a Le Mans hospitality suite. They owe you the luxury version of closure.
The Strait of Hormuz moved more in one hour than their payment has in months.
You don't have a partner. You have Iran, and you're the Strait of Hormuz.
They owe you more than Trump has paid in taxes in any given year. Allegedly.
This is not money anymore. This is a geopolitical incident with shared Netflix.
